title: oldenlandia latifolia
intro: Oldenlandia latifolia, also known as "Mekong delta" or "River of life", is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to Southeast Asia, particularly in China, India, and the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic activities, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. The health benefits of Oldenlandia latifolia include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, and it is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and Ayurvedic practices.
